text.message: Oh well. 4th spot was never good anyway
might end up helping you if I start with a road
Well yeah, hopefully you would have a spot to start with a road so I feel less bad
i'll try to make it happen haha
Well they gave you a massive one
or i can do wood for brick
and blue went for me lol
i did just buy the dev last turn lol
and black wins next turn gg
well done blue getting to 6 pts
we got a game here fellas
I got one road in hand
you have cards in hand to take it back
i'll be busy fighting for road and you'll just win
except blue already got army back, so you are still ahead
So let blue keep army and let me keep road
